name: set_page
description: Replaces the content of one page (diagram) in a local .drawio file with new mxGraphModel XML, leaving every other page in the file untouched. Compression of the replaced page matches whatever that page's original compression state was. Use list_pages/get_page first to find the target page.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the local file. Must end in .drawio or .xml.

page.description: Which page to replace: a zero-based page index (e.g. "0"), the page's exact name, or the page's id as shown by list_pages.

content.description: The new page content as plain mxGraphModel XML (uncompressed). Must be a single <mxGraphModel> element without any <diagram> tags.
